/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  -Xcompiler -fPIC -O3 --use_fast_math "--generate-code=arch=compute_80,code=[compute_80,sm_80]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
